name: 미래에셋증권
ai_analysis: 미래에셋증권(006800.KS)에 대한 애널리스트 컨센서스는 중립 의견입니다. 13명의 애널리스트가 참여한 컨센서스 점수는 5점 만점에 3.62점입니다. 목표가 평균은 51,100원으로 현재 주가 대비 23.8% 하락 여력이 있습니다.

news.title: FuriosaAI targets up to $500m funding for AI chip expansion
news.summary: The funding will enable mass production of RNGD chips, expand global operations, and develop a third-generation chip.

news.title: Montage Technology Draws Alibaba, JPMorgan as Cornerstones for Hong Kong Listing
news.summary: Chinese chipmaker plans Hong Kong IPO that could raise about $900 million, backed by major global cornerstone investors.

news.title: Asian Stocks Hit Record Highs as Tech-Led Rally Widens

news.title: Hong Kong IPO Momentum Builds as Six Chinese Firms Seek to Raise Over $2.0 Billion
news.summary: The companies, spanning from artificial intelligence to chip designers and biopharmaceuticals, aim to raise around US$2.13 billion, according to filings to Hong Kong’s exchange operator.
